items.headline: Clarity Act negotiations: High-level White House meeting planned, sources say
items.subheadline: The most contentious piece of the crypto market structure bill is unresolved in the final weeks of Senate runway, and the president is expected to discuss it.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: U.S. Senate unanimously opposes clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried
items.subheadline: The nonbinding resolution passed without objection after Bankman-Fried asked for clemency, months after Trump pardoned other major crypto figures, including Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: The Clarity Act isn't a ticket to sanctions evasion, actually
items.subheadline: The bill, as currently drafted, has the power to stop sanctions evasion at scale, argues Ari Redbord, global head of policy at TRM Labs.
items.author: Ari Redbord

items.headline: The privacy paradox of protecting kids online
items.subheadline: We don’t need to imagine the privacy pitfalls of age verification. They’ve been happening for years, argues Cardano Foundation CEO Frederik Gregaard.
items.author: Frederik Gregaard

items.headline: The Clarity Act is the most important consumer protection effort in years
items.subheadline: Consumers should not have to wait for another crisis to get the protections they deserve, argues Summer Mersinger, CEO of the Blockchain Association.
items.author: Summer Mersinger

items.headline: AI is destroying the internet. Math is our only hope.
items.subheadline: The rise of autonomous AI agents necessitates the utilization of zero-knowledge proofs, argues Brian Trunzo, chief growth officer at Succinct Labs.
items.author: Brian Trunzo

items.headline: The payment war shifts to distribution as stablecoins reach mainstream status
items.subheadline: Acquisition strategies underscore a massive land grab to capture cross-border remittance flows and native stablecoin reserve economics ahead of tight regulation.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on
items.subheadline: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Tokenization has become a strategic priority for 84% of financial firms
items.subheadline: A Broadridge survey found Wall Street is accelerating tokenization efforts while betting on hybrid markets where digital and traditional assets coexist.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Ripple news: XRP-linked firm lands inside UK plan for tokenized repo, bonds and funds
items.subheadline: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Live updates: Bitcoin tops $65,000 as markets get more good inflation news
items.subheadline: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs took in about $181 million on Tuesday, a day after shedding roughly $425 million, per SoSoValue data. Ether ETFs added about $58 million.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Bitcoin retreats from monthly high as Iran attacks U.S. bases and profit-taking sets in
items.subheadline: Profit-taking after bitcoin's $65,500 monthly high combined with fresh Iranian strikes on U.S. bases sent crypto lower, with bears leading price action across most tokens.
items.author: Oliver Knight

items.headline: Crypto brokerage firm Alpaca raises $135 million for tokenized stock infrastructure
items.subheadline: The company has previously cleared or held in custody roughly 94% of tokenized U.S. equities and now holds over $1.5 billion in underlying stocks.
items.author: Francisco Rodrigues

items.headline: Keyrock acquires BlockFills trading assets in institutional crypto expansion
items.subheadline: The deal adds institutional trading clients, derivatives expertise and regulatory licenses as Keyrock looks to deepen its presence in crypto capital markets.
items.author: Will Canny

items.headline: Visa backs Open USD with new stablecoin platform as Circle (CRCL) faces fresh competition
items.subheadline: Visa launched a stablecoin platform that lets banks and fintechs issue, manage and settle digital dollars through its payments network.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Why Stripe’s $53 billion PayPal bid is a high-stakes play to own the future of digital payments
items.subheadline: If Stripe acquires PayPal, the real prize could consumer wallets, stablecoin issuance or the infrastructure powering the the next generation of digital payments.
items.author: Jamie Crawley

items.headline: Crypto.com lands $400 million investment from Citadel Securities at $20 billion valuation
items.subheadline: The exchange's first institutional funding round values it at $20 billion and will fund expansion into tokenized securities and derivatives.
items.author: Will Canny

items.headline: SBI's Coinhako deal advances plan for Asia's first digital asset empire
items.subheadline: The latest acquisition adds to a string of investments aimed at connecting digital asset markets across Asia.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Inside Robinhood’s high-stakes bet to 'democratizing' millions of its casual users onto blockchain finance
items.subheadline: The company says its advantage lies in bringing retail customers onchain, but early activity remains dominated by memecoins, while its original tokenization pitch remains small.
items.author: Oliver Knight

items.headline: $1.9 trillion asset manager T. Rowe Price bets on active management with first multi-token crypto ETF
items.subheadline: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Bitcoin price news: BTC under $63,000 after new U.S. strike on Iran and Trump's China allegation
items.subheadline: Geopolitical tensions and renewed fears of U.S.-China frictions are weighing on risk assets, including bitcoin.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Ether news today: This $28 million ETH bet aims to profit from pure market chaos
items.subheadline: A high-conviction ether straddle hit the tape this week, showing increasing interest in volatility as an asset class.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: ETH, XRP, HYPE price news: Ether falls twice as hard as bitcoin and HYPE drops 10%
items.subheadline: Japan's Nikkei had its worst day since March. Ether is still the only major holding a gain on the week, barely.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Bitcoin (BTC) price falls below $63,00 as AI fatigue, Middle East tensions drag crypto, tech stocks lower
items.subheadline: Crypto approached the weekend broadly lower as AI stock fatigue and U.S.-Iran tensions weighed on sentiment, though an RSI near 42 hints at oversold conditions heading into the weekend.
items.author: Oliver Knight

items.headline: Live markets: Bitcoin and Nasdaq trim large early losses
items.subheadline: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 level it reached on this week's soft inflation print.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Bitcoin faces fresh headwinds as China’s Kimi beats Claude, GPT in coding benchmark
items.subheadline: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Masalah kuantum Bitcoin mendapatkan alat pemulihan, tetapi bukan untuk 1,1 juta BTC milik Satoshi
items.subheadline: Project Eleven mengklaim telah membiayai sebuah bukti yang memungkinkan jalur derivasi kunci dompet itu sendiri berperan sebagai kepemilikan setelah komputer kuantum dapat memalsukan tanda tangannya. Proses ini berjalan dalam waktu 243 milidetik pada sebuah laptop.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Michael Saylor menyebut proposal baru Bitcoin BIP-110 sebagai 'ide yang buruk'
items.subheadline: Bulls Bitcoin Michael Saylor menentang BIP 110, memperingatkan bahwa proposal "Reduced Data" merupakan upaya berisiko untuk mengatur blockchain. Temukan mengapa Saylor meyakini bahwa "solusi" untuk spam jaringan ini lebih berbahaya daripada masalah itu sendiri.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Bitcoin datar di sekitar $64.000 saat minyak mencapai level tertinggi dalam sebulan dan tekanan jual Kimi AI berlanjut
items.subheadline: Brent jumped almost 4% on escalating U.S.-Iran strikes, while Asian chip stocks stayed under pressure from Friday's Chinese AI shock.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: ETF BTC menarik dana sebesar $273 juta dalam dua minggu. Itu adalah jumlah yang sangat kecil dibandingkan dengan eksodus baru-baru ini
items.subheadline: Apakah Bitcoin ETF kembali? Data baru menunjukkan aliran masuk mingguan sebesar $273 juta, tetapi ini masih “sedikit” dibandingkan dengan arus keluar besar yang terlihat pada awal tahun ini. Jelajahi mengapa terlalu dini untuk menyebut ini sebagai pembalikan pasar.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Berita Ripple: Perusahaan terkait XRP masuk dalam rencana Inggris untuk repo tokenisasi, obligasi, dan dana
items.subheadline: A Treasury-backed report targets putting repo, gilts and funds onchain within two years, and warms to permissionless networks that firms like Ripple have been building on.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Kekayaan kripto Trump membayangi pembahasan Clarity Act untuk melarang konflik kepentingan bagi pejabat AS
items.subheadline: Diskusi di antara Demokrat telah berfokus pada keuntungan pribadi presiden saat membahas ketentuan etika dalam RUU struktur pasar kripto.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: AS, Inggris bergerak untuk menyelaraskan aturan bagi keuangan tokenisasi di pasar keuangan terbesar dunia
items.subheadline: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Mengapa jaringan kripto bernilai miliaran dolar tidak ada di Wikipedia
items.subheadline: Wikipedia mengikuti pedoman mengenai liputan kripto yang telah ada sejak bertahun-tahun lalu, dan menurut laporan tersebut, pedoman tersebut mungkin sudah usang saat ini.
items.author: Jamie Crawley

items.headline: Beberapa Senator Demokrat AS menentang Undang-Undang Clarity, menyebutnya sebagai RUU yang 'korup'
items.subheadline: Beberapa Demokrat semakin tegas menentang RUU struktur pasar kripto, yang memerlukan jumlah signifikan dari partai mereka untuk disahkan.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: CFTC AS bergerak untuk menghentikan Kalshi dari membatalkan perdagangan sesuai perintah pengadilan Michigan
items.subheadline: Regulator derivatif federal, yang mengawasi perdagangan di Kalshi, berpendapat bahwa tidak pantas bagi Michigan untuk "mengintimidasi" perusahaan tersebut agar membatalkan perdagangan.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: Jepang memindahkan kripto ke bawah aturan keuangan dalam pembaruan regulasi
items.subheadline: Perombakan ini menambahkan aturan perdagangan orang dalam, pengungkapan yang lebih ketat, dan sanksi yang lebih berat sekaligus meletakkan dasar untuk ETF bitcoin di masa depan.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Peta jalan ekonomi baru Korea Selatan adalah taruhan besar pada teknologi blockchain
items.subheadline: Dari uji coba pengeluaran publik yang ditokenisasi hingga pilot obligasi pemerintah, negara secara agresif mendorong keuangan publik ke dalam buku besar terdistribusi.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Negosiasi Clarity Act: Pertemuan tingkat tinggi di Gedung Putih direncanakan, kata sumber
items.subheadline: The most contentious piece of the crypto market structure bill is unresolved in the final weeks of Senate runway, and the president is expected to discuss it.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: Senat AS menolak secara bulat pemberian kelonggaran hukuman untuk pendiri FTX, Sam Bankman-Fried
items.subheadline: The nonbinding resolution passed without objection after Bankman-Fried asked for clemency, months after Trump pardoned other major crypto figures, including Changpeng Zhao and Ross Ulbricht.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Ethereum (ETH) news): A timeline of the Ethereum Foundation's ongoing shakeup
items.subheadline: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re unpacking the timeline of all the changes at the Ethereum Foundation this year.
items.author: Margaux Nijkerk

items.headline: Galaxy launches onchain yield vaults for institutions
items.subheadline: The crypto financial services firm launched Galaxy Curator, a Morpho-based platform that gives Fireblocks' 2,400 institutional clients access to onchain yield strategies.
items.author: Will Canny

items.headline: Ripple bergabung dengan raksasa kartu mendukung x402 saat 75 juta pembayaran hanya bergerak sebesar $24 juta
items.subheadline: Empat puluh perusahaan kini mengelola x402, protokol yang dibangun dan diserahkan oleh Coinbase. Protokol ini menyelesaikan sekitar $24 juta dalam 75 juta pembayaran bulan lalu.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Pembaruan langsung: Bitcoin melampaui $65.000 seiring pasar menerima kabar baik lebih lanjut tentang inflasi
items.subheadline: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs took in about $181 million on Tuesday, a day after shedding roughly $425 million, per SoSoValue data. Ether ETFs added about $58 million.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Berita Ethereum (ETH): Garis waktu pergantian yang sedang berlangsung di Ethereum Foundation
items.subheadline: Dalam edisi minggu ini dari The Protocol Newsletter, kami menguraikan garis waktu semua perubahan di Ethereum Foundation tahun ini.
items.author: Margaux Nijkerk

items.headline: Galaxy meluncurkan vault hasil onchain untuk institusi
items.subheadline: The crypto financial services firm launched Galaxy Curator, a Morpho-based platform that gives Fireblocks' 2,400 institutional clients access to onchain yield strategies.
items.author: Will Canny

items.headline: Mode DOG vs. BIP-110: Menyelami klien Bitcoin yang dirancang untuk melewati pembatasan data
items.subheadline: Sementara BIP-110 ingin membatasi data melalui perubahan konsensus dan hampir tidak mendapat dukungan dari para penambang, klien DOG Mode baru menginginkan hal yang sebaliknya dan sama sekali tidak memerlukan pemungutan suara.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Cardano menyerahkan perangkat lunak inti kepada pengembang eksternal untuk mencapai desentralisasi penuh
items.subheadline: Langkah ini menandai sebuah transisi besar bagi blockchain saat kelompok rekayasa independen bersiap untuk memelihara kode perangkat lunak dasar hingga tahun 2027.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Mode DOG menjelaskan pertarungan tata kelola Bitcoin berikutnya
items.subheadline: Klien DOG Mode dari Leonidas menantang kebijakan relay default Bitcoin, membuka kembali perdebatan filosofis mengenai sensor, pasar bebas, dan siapa yang sebenarnya mengatur jaringan tersebut.
items.author: Jamie Crawley

items.headline: Di dalam node baru Zcash yang menargetkan privasi skala Visa dengan kecepatan 50.000 transaksi per detik
items.subheadline: The new Zakura client is the first live piece of a plan to take Zcash from roughly one private transaction per second to payment-network scale.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Dorongan IPO Moonshot AI mengikuti rilis AI Kimi dan Alibaba yang mengguncang bitcoin
items.subheadline: Days after Kimi K3 rattled chip stocks, Moonshot is moving toward a Hong Kong listing at a $30 billion-plus valuation while Alibaba's Qwen goes open-weight.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Pembaruan langsung: Bitcoin turun ke $63.900 saat pasar mempertimbangkan minyak dan penjualan AI yang masih berlangsung
items.subheadline: War drives oil up, the Kimi selloff drags chips down, and bitcoin sits between them.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Ledger wants AI agents to manage crypto without holding your keys
items.subheadline: AI agents can read wallet balances and analyze portfolios but requires every sensitive action to be approved on a Ledger hardware device before it can be executed.
items.author: Margaux Nijkerk

items.headline: DOG Mode vs. BIP-110: Inside the Bitcoin client built to bypass data restrictions
items.subheadline: While BIP-110 wants to restrict data through a consensus change and has almost no miner support, a new DOG Mode client wants the opposite and requires no vote at all.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Cardano hands core software over to outside developers to achieve full decentralization
items.subheadline: The move marks a major transition for the blockchain as independent engineering groups prepare to maintain the underlying software code through 2027.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: Prancis memerintahkan penyedia layanan internet negara untuk memblokir Polymarket
items.subheadline: Regulator mengutip kekhawatiran terkait mekanisme adiktif, kurangnya alat pengecualian diri, dan tingginya volume pengguna Prancis yang melewati pembatasan keuangan sebelumnya.
items.author: Francisco Rodrigues

items.headline: HUT GENIUS Act ke-1: Kondisi Crypto
items.subheadline: Undang-Undang GENIUS yang berfokus pada stablecoin menjadi undang-undang setahun yang lalu.
items.author: Nikhilesh De

items.headline: Para pedagang Polymarket menurunkan peluang pengesahan Clarity Act ke level terendah sepanjang masa seiring penundaan Senat yang berkepanjangan
items.subheadline: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: $2,5 miliar dalam call spread BTC menargetkan $72.000 pada akhir bulan saat The Fed mengadakan pertemuan
items.subheadline: Trader besar di Deribit menunjukkan ekspektasi untuk reli harga menuju $72.000 pada akhir bulan, tepat saat pertemuan The Fed.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Lobi perbankan keliru mengenai stablecoin dan bank komunitas
items.subheadline: Kongres seharusnya tidak menghambat salah satu kemajuan paling nyata dalam infrastruktur pembayaran untuk melindungi bank komunitas dari ancaman yang belum terbukti, kata CEO Eco Ryne Saxe.
items.author: Ryne Sax

items.headline: Apa yang Dikatakan oleh Pemutusan Hubungan Kerja Terbaru Robinhood tentang Kondisi Terkini Investasi Kripto
items.subheadline: Meskipun platform perdagangan sedang menjalani restrukturisasi dan gelombang perusahaan kripto melakukan pemotongan, yang menandakan pasar bearish yang terlambat, Horst, Anderson, dan Zhuleku dari Altcoin Pro menjelaskan bahwa tidak ada alasan untuk panik.
items.author: Ryan Horst

items.headline: Sekuritas tokenized membutuhkan persaingan, bukan penjaga gerbang
items.subheadline: Inovasi berkembang pesat ketika investor memiliki pilihan. Untuk sekuritas yang ditokenisasi, Washington sebaiknya tidak menentukan pemenang sebelum pasar memiliki kesempatan untuk mempelajari apa yang berhasil, tegas Patrick McHenry, wakil ketua di Ondo Finance dan mantan Ketua Komite Jasa Keuangan DPR.
items.author: Patrick McHenry

items.headline: Eropa menutup pintu terhadap kripto luar negeri, namun masih membiarkan jendela dengan risiko tertinggi terbuka
items.subheadline: MiCA tidak pernah dimaksudkan untuk menangani pasar derivatif kripto yang sangat besar. Hal tersebut dapat menimbulkan masalah serius, kata Patrick Gruhn, pendiri dan CEO Perpetuals.com.
items.author: Patrick Gruhn

items.headline: Eropa memimpin dalam regulasi kripto. Sekarang implementasi harus sesuai dengan ambisi
items.author: Richard Teng

items.headline: Agunan, bukan hasil, yang akan menentukan stablecoin mana yang menang
items.subheadline: Seiring stablecoin berbunga yang berkompetisi mencapai kapitalisasi pasar senilai $50 miliar, industri ini justru mengoptimalkan metrik yang salah, menurut Artem Tolkachev, kepala RWA di Falcon Finance.
items.author: Artem Tolkachev

items.headline: Verifikasi usia adalah pengawasan yang tidak pernah dipilih siapa pun
items.subheadline: KOSA dan Chat Control keduanya mundur dari langkah-langkah yang paling dikritik minggu ini, tetapi keduanya tetap mempertahankan verifikasi usia wajib, mekanisme diam-diam yang mengubah penelusuran anonim menjadi penelusuran teridentifikasi bagi kita semua, ujar CEO Billions Evin McMullen.
items.author: Evin McMullen

items.headline: Inggris akhirnya menunjukkan keseriusannya terhadap crypto
items.subheadline: Beberapa langkah regulasi terbaru menunjukkan bahwa Inggris mungkin akhirnya akan berhenti menunda-nunda dalam hal kripto, ujar CEO Wirex Chet Shah.
items.author: Chet Shah

items.headline: Undang-Undang Kejelasan bukanlah tiket untuk penghindaran sanksi, sebenarnya
items.subheadline: Rancangan undang-undang tersebut, sebagaimana yang dirancang saat ini, memiliki kekuatan untuk menghentikan penghindaran sanksi secara besar-besaran, ujar Ari Redbord, kepala kebijakan global di TRM Labs.
items.author: Ari Redbord

items.headline: Paradoks privasi dalam melindungi anak-anak secara online
items.subheadline: Kita tidak perlu membayangkan potensi masalah privasi dari verifikasi usia. Hal tersebut telah terjadi selama bertahun-tahun, kata CEO Cardano Foundation Frederik Gregaard.
items.author: Frederik Gregaard

items.headline: Undang-Undang Kejelasan adalah upaya perlindungan konsumen paling penting dalam beberapa tahun terakhir
items.subheadline: Konsumen tidak seharusnya menunggu krisis lain untuk mendapatkan perlindungan yang mereka layak terima, kata Summer Mersinger, CEO Blockchain Association.
items.author: Summer Mersinger

items.headline: AI sedang menghancurkan internet. Matematika adalah satu-satunya harapan kita.
items.subheadline: Kebangkitan agen AI otonom mengharuskan pemanfaatan bukti tanpa pengetahuan (zero-knowledge proofs), ungkap Brian Trunzo, chief growth officer di Succinct Labs.
items.author: Brian Trunzo

items.headline: Dompet bitcoin yang tidak aktif sejak puncak 2017 baru saja memindahkan $383 juta
items.subheadline: The coins went to a fresh address rather than an exchange, so nothing has been sold yet.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Pembaruan langsung: Harga Bitcoin (BTC) bertahan di $64.000 saat favorit AI kehilangan daya tarik
items.subheadline: Penyelidik blockchain ZachXBT memberikan kritik tajam terhadap dompet perangkat keras. BTC diperdagangkan stabil di sekitar $65.000 setelah kenaikan suku bunga di Korea Selatan.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Bitcoin mundur dari puncak bulanan seiring serangan Iran terhadap basis AS dan aksi ambil untung mulai terjadi
items.subheadline: Pengambilan keuntungan setelah puncak bulanan bitcoin di $65.500 yang dikombinasikan dengan serangan baru dari Iran terhadap pangkalan AS menyebabkan kripto turun, dengan tekanan bearish mendominasi aksi harga di sebagian besar token.
items.author: Oliver Knight

items.headline: Manajer aset senilai $1,9 triliun T. Rowe Price bertaruh pada manajemen aktif dengan ETF kripto multi-token pertamanya
items.subheadline: T. Rowe Price launched what it says is the industry's first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF, offering diversified exposure to digital assets.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Berita harga Bitcoin: BTC di bawah $63.000 setelah serangan baru AS terhadap Iran dan tuduhan Trump terhadap China
items.subheadline: Ketegangan geopolitik dan kekhawatiran yang diperbarui terkait gesekan antara AS dan China memberikan tekanan pada aset berisiko, termasuk bitcoin.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Berita Ether hari ini: Taruhan ETH senilai $28 juta ini bertujuan untuk mendapatkan keuntungan dari kekacauan pasar murni
items.subheadline: Sebuah posisi straddle ether dengan keyakinan tinggi muncul di pasar minggu ini, menunjukkan minat yang meningkat terhadap volatilitas sebagai kelas aset.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Berita harga ETH, XRP, HYPE: Ether turun dua kali lebih tajam dibandingkan bitcoin dan HYPE anjlok 10%
items.subheadline: Japan's Nikkei had its worst day since March. Ether is still the only major holding a gain on the week, barely.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Harga Bitcoin (BTC) turun di bawah $63.000 seiring kelelahan AI dan ketegangan Timur Tengah menekan pasar kripto serta saham teknologi lebih rendah
items.subheadline: Crypto mendekati akhir pekan dengan penurunan luas seiring kelelahan saham AI dan ketegangan AS-Iran yang membebani sentimen, meskipun RSI mendekati 42 mengindikasikan kondisi oversold menjelang akhir pekan.
items.author: Oliver Knight

items.headline: Pasar langsung: Bitcoin dan Nasdaq memangkas kerugian besar di awal perdagangan
items.subheadline: A deepening global selloff in chipmakers dragged risk assets lower, pulling bitcoin back from the $65,000 level it reached on this week's soft inflation print.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Bitcoin menghadapi tantangan baru saat Kimi dari China mengalahkan Claude dan GPT dalam tolok ukur pengkodean
items.subheadline: Moonshot's Kimi K3 took the top spot in frontend coding away from Claude and OpenAI, and it's free. Semiconductor stocks fell, and crypto fell with them.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Trump's crypto riches loom over Clarity Act talks to ban conflicts for U.S. officials
items.subheadline: Discussion among Democrats have fixed on the president's personal gains when hashing out the crypto market structure bill's ethics provision.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
items.subheadline: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.
items.author: Helene Braun

items.headline: Why multi-billion dollar crypto networks are missing from Wikipedia
items.subheadline: Wikipedia observes guidelines on cryto coverage which date back many years, and may now be outdated, according to the report.
items.author: Jamie Crawley

items.headline: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
items.subheadline: Certain Democrats are taking an increasingly rigorous stand against the crypto market structure bill, which needs a significant number from their party to pass.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: U.S. CFTC moves to stop Kalshi from canceling trades as ordered by Michigan court
items.subheadline: The federal derivatives regulator, which oversees trading at Kalshi, argued it was inappropriate for Michigan to "bully" the firm into reversing trades.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: Japan moves crypto under financial rules in regulatory overhaul
items.subheadline: The overhaul adds insider trading rules, tighter disclosures and tougher penalties while laying the groundwork for future bitcoin ETFs.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: South Korea’s new economic roadmap is a massive bet on blockchain technology
items.subheadline: From tokenized public spending trials to government bond pilots, the state is aggressively pushing public finance onto distributed ledgers.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: $2.5 billion in BTC call spreads target $72,000 by the month end when the Fed meets
items.subheadline: Large traders on Deribit show expectations for a price rally to $72,000 by month end, right when the Fed meets.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: DeFi users are missing out on $150 million a year. Here’s why
items.subheadline: About $542 million weekly sat outside active trading ranges, meaning this capital earned zero fees and provided no market depth.
items.author: Francisco Rodrigues

items.headline: Trump targets Brazil's payments system while dollar stablecoins are quietly overtaking country's payments
items.subheadline: Washington views Brazil’s promotion of non-dollar payment channels, including Pix and the growth of stablecoins, as a potential threat to dollar-based trade.
items.author: Francisco Rodrigues

items.headline: DOG Mode explains Bitcoin's next governance fight
items.subheadline: Leonidas' DOG Mode client challenges Bitcoin's default relay policies, reopening a philosophical debate over censorship, free markets and who really governs the network.
items.author: Jamie Crawley

items.headline: The traditional bank account is facing an existential threat from digital wallets
items.subheadline: Finance leaders managing over $4 billion in decentralized vaults predict younger consumers will treat the internet as their primary financial ledger.
items.author: Olivier Acuna

items.headline: France orders country's internet service providers to block Polymarket
items.subheadline: The regulator cited concerns over addictive mechanics, a lack of self-exclusion tools, and a high volume of French users bypassing previous financial restrictions.
items.author: Francisco Rodrigues

items.headline: Inside Zcash's new node that targets Visa-scale privacy at 50,000 transactions per second
items.subheadline: The new Zakura client is the first live piece of a plan to take Zcash from roughly one private transaction per second to payment-network scale.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Bitcoin’s quantum problem gets a recovery tool, but not for Satoshi’s 1.1 million BTC
items.subheadline: Project Eleven says it has funded a proof that lets a wallet's own key-derivation path stand in as ownership after quantum computers can forge its signatures. It runs in 243 milliseconds on a laptop.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Kraken launches crypto options, betting simpler products can expand the market
items.subheadline: The Wyoming-based firm launched USD-settled bitcoin and ether options, saying product design, not demand, has held back adoption.
items.author: Will Canny

items.headline: Tether's USDT hits 2-year countdown threatening its position on U.S. crypto platforms
items.subheadline: The GENIUS Act has hit its first anniversary without U.S. regulators yet meeting deadlines to write regulations, though rules will be in full effect by July 2028.
items.author: Jesse Hamilton

items.headline: Michael Saylor calls Bitcoin's new BIP-110 proposal 'a bad idea'
items.subheadline: Bitcoin bull Michael Saylor is coming out against BIP 110, warning that the "Reduced Data" proposal is a risky attempt to regulate the blockchain. Discover why Saylor believe this "cure" for network spam is more dangerous than the problem itself.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: The GENIUS Act turns 1: State of Crypto
items.subheadline: The stablecoin-focused GENIUS Act became a law a year ago.
items.author: Nikhilesh De

items.headline: Bitcoin flat near $64,000 as oil hits a one-month high and Kimi AI selloff lingers
items.subheadline: Brent jumped almost 4% on escalating U.S.-Iran strikes, while Asian chip stocks stayed under pressure from Friday's Chinese AI shock.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: BTC ETFs attract $273 million in two weeks. That's peanuts compared to recent exodus
items.subheadline: Are Bitcoin ETFs back? New data shows $273 million in weekly inflows, but these are still "peanuts" compared to the massive outflows seen earlier this year. Explore why it's too early to call this a market reversal.
items.author: Omkar Godbole

items.headline: Moonshot AI IPO push follows Kimi, Alibaba AI releases that shook bitcoin
items.subheadline: Days after Kimi K3 rattled chip stocks, Moonshot is moving toward a Hong Kong listing at a $30 billion-plus valuation while Alibaba's Qwen goes open-weight.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa

items.headline: Live updates: Bitcoin dips to $63,900 as markets weigh oil and lingering AI selloff
items.subheadline: War drives oil up, the Kimi selloff drags chips down, and bitcoin sits between them.
items.author: Shaurya Malwa
